title: Marvel Avengers 16pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpacks Erasers Play Pack Gift Set
description:
Is your child a Toy Story fan? Then this drawstring cinch backpack and matching set of stickers bundle is a must-have gift this year! The backpack and stickers both feature characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear, Woody, and more! Kids will love showing off their favorite Toy Story characters at school! The drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use. The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids

Marvel Avengers 16pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpacks Erasers Play Pack Gift Set

Unleash the hero within this holiday season with the ultimate Avengers-Themed Gift Set! Perfect for young fans, this action-packed set includes everything they need to show off their Avengers spirit while staying organized.

What's inside?

Key Features

  • 17PC BACKPACK TOY BUNDLE - Officially licensed Marvel Avengers backpack bundle comes with 17 toys and school supplies for boys: an activity play pack, a spiral notebook with pen, erasers, and a kawaii- style backpack; All accessories are safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision
  • DRAWSTRING CINCH BAG - Easy-to-use cinch closure ensures school supplies and accessories stay secured; Adjustable drawstring cinch provides custom size and comfort; Measures 18” x 13”; Water-resistant polyester material
  • ACTIVITY PLAY PACK - 6pc Avengers play pack comes with a 24 page coloring and activity book with a cool sticker sheet and 4 colors; Encourages creativity and imagination; Great for occupying children during long road trips
  • SPIRAL NOTEBOOK - Avengers-themed spiral notebook comes with a matching clip top ballpoint pen; Kids can practice their penmanship, take notes, and doodle; Spiral style notebook can also double as a diary or journal
  • ERASER SET - 8pc set comes with 8 different shaped erasers kids can use to correct mistakes on homework and school assignments; Small size will fit inside most pencil cases and school supplies organizers

Product Specifications

  • MPN: AVGKPRCG16PCWAL
  • UPC: 885189056990
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: Medium

The 18” by 13” drawstring bag is perfect for school supplies, sporting gear, and more. With a secure cinch closure, your little hero can carry everything they need safely and easily!

The adjustable straps ensure a perfect, comfortable fit for any young Avenger ready to tackle the day with ease.

These colorful Avengers-themed erasers add a fun pop to every pencil case. Perfectly sized for school bags and on-the-go adventures.

Featuring coloring pages, puzzles, stickers, and crayons, this activity book fuels creativity while inspiring hours of entertainment. Plus, the perforated pages let kids proudly display their masterpiece creations!
